# Adgent

> The AI analyst for performance marketers. Adgent connects to your ad platforms,
> reasons about your account, and delivers one brief each morning — the verdict first,
> the evidence underneath. It proposes actions and executes them on your approval.

Adgent is operated by Futuready Labs. It reads Meta and Google Ads through the
platforms' own APIs, enriches with GA4 and Merchant Center, and reconciles platform
claims against ground-truth revenue. It is read-only by default; every write action to
a live ad account is approval-gated.

What separates Adgent from a dashboard: a dashboard renders your data and hands the
analysis back to you. Adgent commits to a conclusion, ranks by impact, says how
confident it is and why, and leaves out anything that didn't change the answer.

## Product

- [Overview](https://adgent.app/): What Adgent is, how the daily brief works, and the Aware → Ask → Apply loop.
- [Pricing](https://adgent.app/pricing): Every plan covers Meta, Google and TikTok. Pricing depends on connected accounts, seats, and whether execution is included — contact sales.
- [About](https://adgent.app/about): The team and the thesis behind the product.

## Blog — field notes on Meta and Google Ads

- [The 7-day window is lying to you before noon](https://adgent.app/attribution-window-day-one-data): Why Meta's attribution window makes day-one ROAS read pessimistic by construction, which metrics mature slowly (ROAS, CPA) and which are final within hours (CTR, CPM), and how to decide without waiting forever.
- [How to scale a winner without breaking it](https://adgent.app/scale-a-winner-without-breaking-it): The 20% rule and learning-phase resets — why the size of each budget step matters more than the destination, and when to scale horizontally instead of vertically.
- [Frequency is a lagging indicator. Watch CPM.](https://adgent.app/cpm-is-the-early-creative-fatigue-signal): Why the CPM–CTR relationship calls creative fatigue days before frequency does, and how to tell fatigue from auction pressure and audience mismatch.
- [Placement drift: the leak hiding in your average](https://adgent.app/placement-drift-the-leak-in-the-average): How Advantage+ placements drift budget toward surfaces that generate the signal but not the outcome, and why a weighted average conceals it.
- [CBO vs ABO in 2026: when each still wins](https://adgent.app/cbo-vs-abo-2026): A decision tree — CBO for scaling known winners at volume, ABO when you're buying an answer and each option needs a fair sample.
- [Meta says 4.2×, Google says 3.1×. Both are right.](https://adgent.app/cross-platform-comparability-meta-google): Why platform ROAS figures aren't comparable (different windows, models, and conversion definitions), the double-counting problem, and how to build a comparability boundary against ground-truth revenue.
- [Why Adgent leads with the verdict](https://adgent.app/why-adgent-leads-with-the-verdict): The design principle behind every brief — conclusion first, evidence underneath, nothing you didn't need.

## Legal and data handling

- [Privacy](https://adgent.app/privacy): What data is collected, why, how long it's kept.
- [Data use](https://adgent.app/data-use): Plain-language summary of what Adgent reads from each connected platform, and what it never does with it.
- [Security](https://adgent.app/security): Encryption, access controls, token handling, incident response.
- [Terms](https://adgent.app/terms): Terms of service.

## Notes

- Contact: osman@futureadylabs.com
- Blog posts explain concepts and mechanics; they contain no customer data or performance benchmarks.
- Pricing is not published. Contact sales for a quote.
- Adgent is approval-gated on every write action. It is not an autonomous spender.
